user.title: Set up List Merger
user.description: Create a merged master todo list from multiple sources.

data.completed_behavior: When an item is completed on master

data_description.master_name: Name shown in Home Assistant for this merger (and for the new list if created).
data_description.delete_on_merge: Remove the item from the source list after it is added to the master list.

existing_master.title: Select master list
existing_master.description: Choose an existing todo list to act as the master list.

select_sources.title: Select source lists
select_sources.description: Choose which todo lists to merge into the master list.

configure_source.title: Configure source: {entity_id}
configure_source.description: Set how **{entity_id}** syncs with the master list.

data.delete_on_merge: Delete from source after adding to master

error.no_sources: Please select at least one source list.
